content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Necromancer
description: Maliwan class mod for Maya the Siren, built around Strength of Five Gorillas, Wires Don't Talk, Made of Sterner Stuff.
notes: Some Good variants previously applied the wrong effect, increasing reload time instead of reducing it. Neutral variants can offset the Smaller, Lighter, Faster magazine penalty on single-round weapons (eg Infinity). The mag size bonus starts at 13%, which is higher than the perk's maximum 4% penalty while the mod is equipped. The item card may show incorrect fire rate, reload speed, and accuracy values.

special.description: At level cap, rolls one bonus from each pool. Pool 1: Neutral +58.5% Mag Size, Chaotic +58.5% Fire Rate, Lawful +58.5% Accuracy. Pool 2: Neutral +58.5% Mag Size, Evil +58.5% Crit Damage, Good +58.5% Reload Speed. True Neutral gives double Mag Size (+93.6%).
